title: Adis Zemen Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Adis Zemen with a Z-Score of +3.86. This event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Adis Zemen is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.5 GG. 
 The low humidity of 13% and moderate wind speed of 15.9 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The city is experiencing no heating degree days, but the cooling degree days are significantly high, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the heat wave's impact on the city's infrastructure and residents.
